title: EU AI Act: High-Risk AI Systems Full Compliance
description: All high-risk AI systems must be fully compliant with EU AI Act requirements including risk management, data governance, technical documentation, and conformity assessment.
requirements: EU authorized representative appointed (if outside EU)

title: EU AI Act: Foundation Models (GPAI) Compliance
description: General-purpose AI models with systemic risk (>10^25 FLOPs) must comply with additional obligations.

title: EU AI Act: Prohibited AI Practices Ban
description: AI systems with unacceptable risk are prohibited from EU market.
prohibitedPractices: Real-time biometric identification in public spaces (with exceptions)

title: CPRA: Annual Risk Assessment Due
description: Annual cybersecurity audit and risk assessment for businesses processing high-risk personal information.

title: UK AI Act: Public Consultation Response Deadline
description: Final opportunity to respond to UK AI Act public consultation.

title: NIST AI Framework: Version 2.0 Expected
description: NIST expected to release updated AI Risk Management Framework incorporating recent developments.

title: Canada AIDA: Parliamentary Committee Review
description: Parliamentary committee expected to complete review of Bill C-27 including AIDA provisions.

title: EU AI Act: Implementing Acts Publication
description: European Commission to publish detailed implementing acts and technical standards.
